what_went_well: All 7 task groups implemented in full (21 sub-tasks marked complete)
Plain manifests follow design.md decisions exactly: single namespace, shared labels, ConfigMap/Secret split, Deployments with PVCs, correct probe config
ConfigMap/Secret mapping covers all .env.deployment.example variables with correct classification
OpenSearch init container handles vm.max_map_count requirement automatically
kustomization.yaml enables single-command apply of all resources in dependency order
Runbook covers all acceptance checks from tasks.md: prerequisites, namespace, config, infra, core, agent, access
hello-agent uses ai.platform.agent=true label on both Deployment and Service for agent discovery compatibility
improvement_suggestions: Add a database migration Job manifest for running Doctrine migrations on first boot
Add a kustomize overlay for production (different image tags, resource limits, real secrets via external-secrets)
Consider adding Makefile targets k8s-plain-apply / k8s-plain-destroy for the plain manifest path
deviations_from_spec: Task 7.4: agent-requirements docs not modified — no agent deployment conventions changed by this task (hello-agent uses existing conventions unchanged)
